name: Apple Spice Custard Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 medium apples; peel and core (finely chop about 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the cake mix according to the directions on the package. Stir in the chopped apples.
3. Pour the batter into a well-greased and floured 9x13-inch baking dish.
4. Bake for 30 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium-sized bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk, sour cream, and lemon juice.
6. After removing the cake from the oven, spread the milk and sour cream mixture over the top.
7. Return the cake to the oven and bake for 10 more minutes or until set like custard.
8. Sprinkle with cinnamon. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
9. Store in the refrigerator.
12 servings.
